name: 11L XSA4 + EMA + LoRA TTT + Partial RoPE + GPTQ-lite (dim480)
author: Nathan Maine
blurb: PR #462 architecture compressed to ~15.5MB: MODEL_DIM=480, NUM_KV_HEADS=4, MLP_HIDDEN=1536, 11L. EMA (decay 0.9985), Partial RoPE (16/64 dims), Late QAT int6 STE (threshold 0.15), single-pass LoRA TTT (rank 8, lr 0.01, 1 epoch), XSA on deepest 4 layers, BigramHash (8192 buckets, dim 128), SmearGate, int6+zstd-22 compression (3.83x ratio). ~7,900 steps in 600s on 8xH100 SXM Iceland. NVIDIA Inception member.
